title: Your reservation
notFound: This link has expired or is no longer valid. Please contact the restaurant to view or change your reservation.
attendanceConfirmed: You confirmed you're coming — thank you!
changeReceivedBody: We'll get in touch as soon as possible to confirm the change.
cancelDescription: Sorry to hear you can't make it. Would you like to leave a short reason?
changeDescription: Let us know your preference below. We'll confirm the change personally.
toastCancelSuccess: Thanks for letting us know — your reservation is cancelled.
toastChangeSuccess: Change request sent — we'll be in touch.
changeAppliedBody: Your reservation has been updated. You'll receive a confirmation email.
changeRejectedBody: We couldn't process this change automatically. Please contact the restaurant.

changeRejectedReason.default: We couldn't process this change automatically. Please contact the restaurant.
changeRejectedReason.too_late_min_notice: Your change is too close to the reservation to process automatically.
changeRejectedReason.closed_on_date: We're closed on the requested date.
changeRejectedReason.outside_opening_hours: The requested time is outside our opening hours.
changeRejectedReason.partial_closure: We're partly closed at the requested time — please get in touch.
changeRejectedReason.no_table_available: We don't have a table available for your new request. We'll be happy to help personally.
changeRejectedReason.large_party_needs_staff: For this group size, we'll confirm your change personally.
changeRejectedReason.auto_apply_disabled: The restaurant is currently confirming changes personally.
